title: Osmosis Settings
pageDescription: Configure the extension by category and keep your reading workflow predictable.

basic.title: Basic
basic.description: Core preferences used across the extension.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Control theme, highlights, and visual annotation colors.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.description: Choose how inline annotations behave while reading.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.description: Pick the provider used to fetch definitions.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Choose where your saved words are stored.

showComments.label: Show Comments
showComments.description: Display the first definition above the highlighted word.

dictionary.label: Dictionary
dictionary.description: Choose the dictionary API for word definitions.

vault.label: Storage Provider
vault.description: Choose where your saved words are stored.

highlightStyle.label: Highlight Style
highlightStyle.description: Choose how the starred words are underlined.
